justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all temporal expressions, including the initial ambiguous "among 2 pm" and subsequent specific date and time requests.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently reported unavailability and then asked the user to provide new times without offering any alternative slots or suggestions.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The conversation was mostly efficient, with the agent accurately processing each new time request without redundant questions, though it did require multiple turns to find an available slot.
justifications.customer_experience: The experience was workable but became tiring due to the agent's inability to proactively suggest alternative times, leading to several unproductive turns.
